name: Epic Jump!
short_description: Epic Jump! is a 2.5D platform game, where you can choose from three difficulties to jump from platform to platform to complete the level and get rewarded with points!
detailed_description:
Embark on an exciting journey with Epic Jump! Feel the thrill as you navigate meticulously crafted 2.5D landscapes, where each jump is a leap of faith. From icy tundras to scorching deserts and treacherous waters, every environment presents unique challenges to overcome. Whether you're a lone explorer or prefer the company of a friend, Epic Jump! offers thrilling local multiplayer action.

Experience the joy of classic platformers with a modern twist, capturing the essence of gaming's golden age. Dive into Epic Jump! now and witness the evolution of timeless gameplay. Stay connected with our lively community and follow the latest developments by joining our Discord server at R4ptor Studios.
